description: In the open Red Lion Crimson 3.0 project, configure a new data tag named 'TT_001' for an Ambient Temperature Sensor using the specifications found in 'tag_specifications.csv'. These values, including data type, label, limits, and alarm thresholds, are derived from real air quality monitoring sensor data. Save the project to C:\Users\ga\Documents\AmbientSensor.cd3.

metadata.data_source: UCI Air Quality Dataset - real sensor readings from Italian city monitoring station (2004-2005)
